image:image.image:caption: Iro AI learning paths across core AI skills and tool mastery: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, prompting, agents
image:image.image:title: Iro AI paths screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Iro AI prompt builder exercise — assemble a strong prompt piece by piece
image:image.image:title: Iro AI prompt builder screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Iro AI Custom Paths — type any topic and Iro builds a full learning path
image:image.image:title: Iro AI custom path creator screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Iro AI Operator Build — six AI skill zones scored out of 100 with strongest skill and weak spot
image:image.image:title: Iro AI skill profile screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Iro AI Duels arena — five AI questions against a rating-matched opponent
image:image.image:title: Iro AI duels screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Ask Iro — the AI coach quizzes you on lessons and points you to the next practice rep
image:image.image:title: Ask Iro AI coach screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Iro AI rank evolution — Iro evolves at each new rank up to Diamond
image:image.image:title: Iro AI rank up screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Iro AI weekly AI news briefings with read-and-quiz exercises
image:image.image:title: Iro AI news screenshot

image:image.image:caption: Iro AI Prompt Library — 250 battle-tested prompts with search and filters
